purpose: Evidence for Validator-A when its own sandbox policy cannot execute node/npm commands.

commands.summary: Dry-run validated the Validator-B handoff and printed command shape: gemini --prompt <prompt omitted> --output-format json --sandbox. Ledger and output files were not changed.
Harness audit passed: doc headers, ledger validation, handoff validation, generator parsing fixture, completion gates, final git-state check, and quality-score checks all passed.
Whitespace check passed with only CRLF conversion warnings.

resource_notes: Gemini CLI is not installed locally, so live Validator-B model execution was not attempted.
Validator-B dry-run does not require Gemini installation and is the expected validation mode for this implementation task.
